历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 13287 → 14103 → 14357 → 14879 → 10891. From 2021 to 2024, there was a trend of gradual backward movement (cumulative backward shift of about 1592 places), but in 2025, an abnormal forward shift occurred, with the ranking significantly improving to 10891, an increase of about 3988 places compared to 2024, showing significant fluctuation. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Liaoning Province was 73 in 2021, 79 in 2022, 79 in 2023, 79 in 2024, 73 in 2025, and 73 in 2026. The 2026 plan is the same as 2025, with no expansion or contraction, indicating stable enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Shanghai Ranking's main list has continuously risen from 30th in 2021 to 24th in 2026, reflecting steadily improving comprehensive strength. It ranks 13th in overall Douyin popularity (high heat), with main content being cafeteria food and Zhang Xuefeng's recommendations, indicating high positive exposure. In 2024, its reputation evaluation was clearly negative (poor enrollment communication led to a sharp drop in admission scores by about 500 places), but the significant forward shift in 2025 ranking suggests that the negative public opinion has been digested and no longer suppresses applications. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 5 A+ disciplines (Crop Science, Veterinary Medicine, Animal Science, Grassland Science, Food Science and Engineering), 2 A disciplines (Plant Protection, Biology), totaling 7 disciplines rated A- or above, demonstrating top national strength in agriculture and forestry, strongly attracting applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, closely matching the university's Computer Science and Electronic Information majors, boosting application heat for related majors. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Liaoning Province is approximately 146,000 (estimated), slightly increasing from 143,000 in 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition. The university is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal to Liaoning examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the correction pressure after the abnormal forward shift in 2025 ranking, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the continuously rising university ranking, high positive exposure on Douyin, and a slight increase in Physics Category examinees, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 2025 ranking of 10891. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 11091, with a range of 10591 to 11591.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 10591 to 11591, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (such as Veterinary Medicine, Food Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Mathematics and Applied Mathematics) as the main choices, with Tier 1 majors (Science Experimental Classes, Computer Science, Electronic Information) as reach options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<10591), focus on reaching for top Tier 1 majors. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>11591), use Tier 3 majors as safety options. Majors related to the Yantai Research Institute (Facility Agriculture Science and Engineering, Aquaculture, etc.) have relatively lower ranking requirements, making them suitable as stable choices for examinees with lower rankings.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category fluctuated around 1924→2263→2012→1842→2173, overall within the 1800–2300 range, with no clear unilateral trend; the 2025 baseline is approximately 2173; enrollment plans for History Category were 17 in 2021, 18 in 2022, 20 in 2023, 20 in 2024, 32 in 2025, and 33 in 2026, with a slight increase of 1 student (+3.1%) in 2026 compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; its ranking on the Soft Science China University Main List has steadily risen from 30th in 2021 to 24th in 2026, reflecting continuous improvement in overall strength; it ranks 13th in Douyin popularity (high heat) with high positive exposure; its 2024 reputation evaluation was significantly negative but has been digested, with no sustained suppression on applications; it has 5 A+ disciplines in the fifth round of discipline evaluation (Crop Science, Veterinary Medicine, Animal Science, Grassland Science, and Food Science and Engineering) and 2 A disciplines (Plant Protection, Biology). Although primarily focused on agriculture, forestry, and engineering, the 985 platform still has brand appeal for liberal arts majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language/Literature are socially popular and recommended, related to the university's enrollment majors like Law, Sociology, and Communication; the number of History Category examinees in Liaoning Province in 2026 is estimated at about 54,000, slightly down from 56,000 in 2025, slightly easing competition; the university is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal for Liaoning liberal arts examinees.

预测结论.text: Considering factors such as a slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+1 student), a slight decrease in History Category examinees, and the university's rising ranking, the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is expected to move slightly forward from the 2025 baseline of 2173, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 2184, and a range of 1856–2512.
